name: io.github.makemouse/fish-bridge-mcp
title: fish-bridge — Session Knowledge Graph
description: Compresses AI chat sessions into a typed knowledge graph. Local/offline via Ollama.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Claude extraction backend (omit when using local/Ollama)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for OpenAI extraction backend (omit when using local/Ollama)

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Gemini extraction backend (omit when using local/Ollama)
